channel.title: Ads on TLDRBins
channel.description: Recent content in Ads on TLDRBins

item.title: SMB Enum
item.description: SMB Share Enum Login without password smbmap smbmap -H 10.10.11.10 smbmap -H 10.10.11.10 -u null # List known share smbmap -H 10.10.11.10 -r 'share' smbclient smbclient -N -L \\\\10.10.11.10\\ #After found an accessible share smbclient -N \\\\10.10.11.10\\share\\ #After connection #List all files in a share recurse ON ls #Download all files mask "" recurse ON prompt OFF mget * # Fix: Unable to initialize messaging context. protocol negotiation failed: NT_STATUS_CONNECTION_DISCONNECTED smbclient -N -L \\\\10.
